MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Quidachay; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Dev. Corp. is present. Represented by Damian Mercury.
Attorney Michael Rossoff for the plaintiff.
Defendant Sabrina Winston is present.
Attorney Dennis Lee appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem M. Davidovitz, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of AUG-12-2013 is vacated. (501/JPT)
